purpose: Capture a fresh row32 no-comment/max1400 native pair to test whether the max1400 structural family remains row0-row1-local or scales like an extent/pseudo-row structure

entries.label: grc32_no_comment_native_20260307
entries.description: row32 native no-comment control using standard empty multirow geometry for max1400 scaling comparison

entries.label: grc32_max1400_native_20260307
entries.description: row32 native max1400 comment control using standard empty multirow geometry and scratchpad/max1400_comment_body_20260307.txt

decision_target.row_local_hypothesis: row32 preserves essentially the same low-row structural signature already seen in the 1-row lane
decision_target.extent_like_hypothesis: row32 introduces scaling behavior outside the existing row0-row1 family, consistent with a larger extent/pseudo-row model
